title: World hidden-exit discovery store (v1)
description: World-scoped record of which hidden room exits players have revealed via the SEARCH command, persisted as the single file data/world-state/discovered-exits.json. Once any player searches a hidden exit into the open it becomes a normal visible, walkable exit for everyone, permanently — this file makes that promise survive server restarts. The loader is deliberately defensive: a missing, empty, or malformed file reveals nothing, so a corrupt store can never accidentally open an exit no one has found. Absence of this file simply means nothing has been discovered yet.

rooms.description: One entry per room that has at least one discovered hidden exit.

room_id.description: Id of the room whose hidden exit(s) have been discovered.

directions.description: The discovered hidden-exit directions, stored as Direction enum names.
